name: OpenAI o3-mini (Medium)
note: Default reasoning-effort setting; roughly matches full o1 on AIME/GPQA at a fraction of the cost.

results.notes: From OpenAI's own simple-evals README results table, the bolded 'o3-mini' row (default reasoning level, explicitly footnoted as 'medium') -- confirmed by direct fetch of the raw README: MMLU 85.9, GPQA 74.9, MATH 97.3, HumanEval 96.3, MGSM 90.8, DROP 79.2, SimpleQA 13.4. Only the GPQA figure collides with an already-tracked slug (different source, so skipped per instructions); the other 6 columns are new. Same provenance pattern already used for the sibling o3-mini-high.json entry.
MATH-500, from the 'o3-mini' (medium/default) row of OpenAI's simple-evals README table. Verified via raw GitHub fetch.

verificationNotes: Same model as o3-mini (Low) verification, different effort tier. AIME 76.9, GPQA 76.8, Codeforces 2036, SWE-bench 42.9 (medium effort) all confirmed by direct fetch of the lesswrong.com article, matching exactly. Release date, context window, and pricing confirmed identically to the Low-effort record. No changes made.
